name: Write Technical Documentation
description: Produce complete technical documentation for a codebase: architecture overview, API reference, setup guide, and developer runbook

steps.name: Understand the Codebase
steps.description: Read the main entry points, module structure, configuration, and data flow. Understand what the system does, who uses it, and how it's deployed.
steps.acceptance_criteria: System purpose, main components, data flow, and deployment model understood and noted

steps.name: Architecture Overview
steps.description: Write a high-level architecture document: system diagram description, component responsibilities, data flow, external dependencies, and design decisions with rationale.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Architecture doc written with system overview, component descriptions, data flow, and key design decisions

steps.name: Setup & Installation Guide
steps.description: Write step-by-step setup instructions: prerequisites, installation, environment variables, database setup, and how to run locally. Test the instructions mentally against the code.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Setup guide written that a new developer could follow from zero to running locally

steps.name: API Reference
steps.description: Document every public API endpoint or function: parameters, types, return values, errors, and example requests/responses. Generate OpenAPI spec if it's an HTTP API.
steps.acceptance_criteria: All public APIs documented with types, parameters, examples, and error cases

steps.name: Developer Runbook
steps.description: Write operational runbook: how to run tests, how to deploy, common debugging steps, how to roll back, and answers to the top 5 questions a new developer would ask.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Runbook covers test/deploy/rollback/debug workflows and FAQ for new developers

steps.name: Review & Polish
steps.description: Read all docs as if you are a new developer. Fix gaps, unclear explanations, and missing cross-references. Ensure consistent tone and formatting throughout.
steps.acceptance_criteria: All docs are consistent, gaps filled, cross-referenced, and readable by a developer unfamiliar with the system
